title: Death, dust and desperation: Venezuela's twin earthquakes leave nearly 1,000 dead, trail of despair- watch
summary_full: Venezuela reels from twin earthquakes, with the death toll tragically climbing to 920 and over 50,000 reported missing amidst widespread devastation. Rescue efforts are in full swing, with international aid pouring in from nations like the US and India, which launched Operation Amistad. The humanitarian crisis deepens, particularly for the millions of children affected, as the search for survivors continues under mountains of rubble.
